next_steps: Set access.nodes[0].ip on inventory/manual/systems/n8n-a.json from query --live upstream_url.
Add a BIND forward A record when using a public hostname.
Configure nginx-waf sites[] with proxy_pass to the CT upstream (http://<ct-ip>:5678).
Open the n8n web UI (public_url or CT IP:5678) and complete first-run owner setup.
Keep HDC_N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY backed up — losing it makes stored credentials unrecoverable.
